companies.name: Apple
companies.latest_info: WWDC 2026 set for June 8-12, showcasing iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27 with Siri overhauls. CEO Tim Cook recently joined the U.S. delegation to Beijing.

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.latest_info: GTC Taipei (alongside COMPUTEX) scheduled for June 1-4, 2026. CEO Jensen Huang visited Beijing with President Trump. US approved H200 sales to major Chinese tech firms.

companies.name: Huawei
companies.latest_info: Launched 950PR AI chip with better CUDA compatibility; strong orders from ByteDance and Alibaba. Global ICT Competition finals June 2-5, 2026 in Shenzhen.

companies.name: ByteDance
companies.latest_info: Investing over $30 billion in AI infrastructure. Preparing orders for Huawei's newest Ascend 950PR processors to bypass supply restrictions.

companies.name: Alibaba
companies.latest_info: Planning to utilize Huawei's 950PR chips while also receiving newly licensed Nvidia H200 chips. Expanding cloud computing data centers across Asia for localized GenAI.
